violations.description: Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Inside of utensil drawers were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed employees touching clothing and held temperature device with gloves and did not change gloves. Gloves should be changed when touching items not pertaining to the food being prepared.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
